items.title: Trade Alert: Profiting From The Carnage
items.summary: Trade Alert #106: Buying ServiceNow (NOW). $550 position (~3% of portfolio) at market open. Thesis: retail panic (Robinhood -54% holdings) vs institutional buying (IFP +146%, Yarborough +155%, Prospera +131%). NOW down 66% from $240 peak to $82 low. Fundamentals strong: 20% revenue growth, 36% FCF, $6B cash. CEO bought $3M personally in Feb 2026. AI bear case refuted — ServiceNow is the AI orchestration layer, not a casualty.
